name: Caramel Pecan Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. CRUST: Combine all ingredients in a food processor or with an electric mixer until blended. Press evenly into a 15" x 10" x 3/4 inch (2L) jelly roll pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
3. FILLING: Spread pecans evenly over the crust.
4. In a large, heavy saucepan, melt butter and honey. Add brown sugar. Boil 5-7 minutes, stirring constantly, until a rich brown caramel color.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in cream. Mix well and pour over pecans.
6. Bake for an additional 15 minutes. Cool, then cut into bars.
Helpful Hint: Take time to place the pecan right side up. Freezes well. Makes about 50 bars.
